ScenarioName: Highly Targeted Spear Phishing of Executives
ScenarioName_ZH: 针对高管的高度定向鱼叉式钓鱼攻击
Description: Attackers craft bespoke emails to executives using internal project details.
Description_ZH: 攻击者利用内部项目信息精心定制钓鱼邮件攻击高管。

ScenarioName: Compromised Mailbox Used for Internal Phishing
ScenarioName_ZH: 被攻陷邮箱用于内部钓鱼传播
Description: An internal mailbox is compromised and used to phish other staff.
Description_ZH: 内部邮箱被攻陷后被用于向其他员工发送钓鱼邮件。

ScenarioName: Phishing Combined with Phone and SMS
ScenarioName_ZH: 电话与短信配合的多渠道社会工程攻击
Description: Attackers use email, phone and SMS together to socially engineer staff.
Description_ZH: 攻击者联合使用邮件、电话和短信对员工实施社会工程攻击。

ScenarioName: Multiple Privileged Accounts Compromised
ScenarioName_ZH: 多个特权账号同时遭受攻陷
Description: Evidence suggests several admin accounts have been taken over.
Description_ZH: 有证据显示多个管理员账号已被攻击者接管。

ScenarioName: No Separation Between Admin and User Accounts
ScenarioName_ZH: 管理员账号与普通账号未分离
Description: Admins use the same account for everyday work and administration.
Description_ZH: 管理员使用同一账号处理日常工作和执行管理操作。

ScenarioName: Inadequate Identity Verification for Remote Joiners
ScenarioName_ZH: 远程入职员工身份核验不充分
Description: New remote staff join without robust identity checks before account issue.
Description_ZH: 新远程员工在账号签发前未经过充分的身份核验。

ScenarioName: Large-Scale Exposure of Personal Data
ScenarioName_ZH: 大规模个人数据泄露事件
Description: A large dataset of personal data is exposed due to misconfigured access controls.
Description_ZH: 因访问控制配置错误导致大量个人数据遭到泄露。

ScenarioName: Backups Corrupted or Encrypted by Malware
ScenarioName_ZH: 备份数据遭勒索软件加密损毁
Description: Backups are found to be unusable after a ransomware incident.
Description_ZH: 勒索软件事件后发现备份数据已不可用。

ScenarioName: Untracked Copies of Highly Confidential Data
ScenarioName_ZH: 高度机密数据的副本失控扩散
Description: Highly confidential data exists in multiple locations outside central control.
Description_ZH: 高度机密数据以多份副本形式散存于集中管控范围之外。

ScenarioName: Critical System Directly Exposed to Internet
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键系统管理接口直接暴露于互联网
Description: A critical system has a management interface that is directly reachable from the internet.
Description_ZH: 关键系统的管理接口可从互联网直接访问。

ScenarioName: Multiple Unsupported Core Systems
ScenarioName_ZH: 多个核心系统运行存在严重漏洞的停止支持版本
Description: Several core systems run unsupported OS versions with known serious vulnerabilities.
Description_ZH: 多个核心系统运行存在已知严重漏洞的停止支持操作系统版本。

ScenarioName: Malware Persistence Despite Remediation Efforts
ScenarioName_ZH: 恶意软件修复后反复出现
Description: Malware repeatedly reappears across the estate, suggesting poor containment.
Description_ZH: 恶意软件在修复后多次重新出现，表明清除和隔离措施不到位。

ScenarioName: Inadequate Monitoring of Critical Network Segments
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键网络区段监控严重不足
Description: There is little or no monitoring of traffic in and out of critical segments.
Description_ZH: 关键网络区段的进出流量几乎没有任何监控措施。

ScenarioName: Critical System Administered from Personal Devices
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键系统从个人设备执行特权操作
Description: Privileged operations are performed from unmanaged personal devices.
Description_ZH: 特权操作从非受管个人设备上执行。

ScenarioName: No Assurance Over Third-Party Remote Access
ScenarioName_ZH: 第三方远程访问缺乏管控保障
Description: Third-party remote access is not technically or procedurally supervised.
Description_ZH: 第三方远程访问在技术和流程层面均缺乏有效监督。

ScenarioName: Key Security Logs Missing or Overwritten
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键安全日志缺失或被覆盖
Description: Important security logs are not retained long enough for investigations.
Description_ZH: 重要安全日志保留时间不足以支撑安全调查需要。

ScenarioName: No MFA on Critical Cloud Admin Accounts
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键云管理账号未启用多因素认证
Description: Cloud admin accounts for identity or email services do not require MFA.
Description_ZH: 身份服务或邮件服务的云管理账号未要求多因素认证。

ScenarioName: Password Reuse with External Services
ScenarioName_ZH: 管理员口令在外部服务中复用
Description: Admin or staff passwords are reused across external unmanaged services.
Description_ZH: 管理员或员工口令在非受管外部服务中重复使用。

ScenarioName: Dormant Privileged Accounts
ScenarioName_ZH: 休眠特权账号长期未处理
Description: Legacy privileged accounts remain enabled but unused.
Description_ZH: 遗留特权账号长期处于启用状态但从未使用。

ScenarioName: Publicly Accessible Cloud Storage with Sensitive Data
ScenarioName_ZH: 含敏感数据的云存储桶公开暴露
Description: A cloud bucket containing sensitive data is exposed to the public internet.
Description_ZH: 含敏感数据的云存储桶暴露于公共互联网。

ScenarioName: No Encryption for Database at Rest
ScenarioName_ZH: 重要数据库静态存储未加密
Description: Important customer database is stored without encryption at rest.
Description_ZH: 重要客户数据库在静态存储时未进行加密保护。

ScenarioName: Over-Broad Access to Reporting System
ScenarioName_ZH: 报表系统访问权限过于宽泛
Description: Reporting tools allow many staff to export large amounts of data.
Description_ZH: 报表工具允许大量员工导出大规模数据。

ScenarioName: Critical Vulnerability on Internet-Facing Service
ScenarioName_ZH: 面向互联网服务存在关键未修复漏洞
Description: An internet-facing system has a critical unpatched vulnerability.
Description_ZH: 面向互联网的系统存在关键的未修复安全漏洞。

ScenarioName: Weak Segmentation Around Critical System
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键系统周边网络隔离薄弱
Description: Critical services share network zones with less trusted systems.
Description_ZH: 关键服务与可信度较低的系统共处同一网络区域。

ScenarioName: Limited Logging of Access to Critical System
ScenarioName_ZH: 关键系统访问日志记录不完整
Description: Access to critical systems is not fully logged or centrally stored.
Description_ZH: 关键系统的访问日志记录不完整且未集中存储。
